name: Wax & Pedi Express
tagline: Salon-quality waxing & pedicures, in the comfort of your home.
description: Professional mobile beauty therapist serving in Greenwich and surrounding areas. Fully insured, qualified, and dedicated to delivering exceptional waxing and pedicure treatments at your doorstep.
bookingPolicy: Bookings are made through Square Appointments. Card details may be required to secure your appointment. No payment is taken at booking.
cancellationPolicy: If you cancel with less than 24 hours' notice or do not attend, a late cancellation/no-show fee of 50% of the selected treatment price may be charged.
travelFeeNote: Travel is free within [X] miles of [SE London]. A small travel supplement may apply for postcodes outside the core coverage area — please enquire.
